description: Validate any of the various reasoning protocol agents completed their tasks to minimal satisfaction.

hooks.prompt: Verify: (1) all required phases were completed, (2) output contract fields are present, (3) validation_tier is declared. Return 'approve' if all checks pass, or 'block' with the specific missing requirement.

Verify: (1) all required phases were completed, (2) output contract fields are present, (3) validation_tier is declared, (4) findings include category and severity, and (5) assumption_inventory is present. Return 'approve' if all checks pass, or 'block' with the specific missing requirement.

Verify: (1) all required phases were completed, (2) output contract fields are present, (3) validation_tier is declared, (4) source traceability is sufficient, and (5) scope compliance. Return 'approve' if all checks pass, or 'block' with the specific missing requirement.
